sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87636" key="proka/rpion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκάρπιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n87636.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the part of the hand next the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καρπός,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.142</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
